challenges.title: Minimal HTML Page
challenges.description: Create a minimal HTML page that contains the three essential structural tags: <html>, <head>, and <body>. Assign your code to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '<html>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain an <html> tag'
assert '</html>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a closing </html> tag'
assert '<head>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <head> tag'
assert '</head>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a closing </head> tag'
assert '<body>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <body> tag'
assert '</body>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a closing </body> tag'
hints: Every HTML page needs three structural tags: <html>, <head>, and <body>.
The <head> and <body> tags go inside the <html> tag.

challenges.title: Page with Title and Paragraph
challenges.description: Create an HTML page with a inside the <head> and a <p> paragraph inside the <body> that explains what a website is. Assign your code to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a page with a title and a paragraph -->

"""
challenges.test_code:
assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain an tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <title> tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a closing tag' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a tag' assert '

' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a

paragraph tag' assert '

' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a closing

tag' assert len(html.split('

')[0].split('

')[1].strip()) > 10, 'Paragraph should contain meaningful text about websites'
hints: The <title> tag goes inside <head> and sets the browser tab text.

The

tag goes inside and contains paragraph text.
